test.create_query: CREATE TABLE bench_isect_overlap_{n} (poly Polygon) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE bench_isect_early_empty_{n} (poly Polygon) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO bench_isect_overlap_{n} SELECT [[(0., 0.), (toFloat64(100 - number * (100.0 / {n})), 0.), (toFloat64(100 - number * (100.0 / {n})), toFloat64(100 - number * (100.0 / {n}))), (0., toFloat64(100 - number * (100.0 / {n}))), (0., 0.)]] FROM numbers({n})
test.query: SELECT groupPolygonIntersection(poly) FROM bench_isect_overlap_{n} FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT groupPolygonIntersection(poly) FROM bench_isect_early_empty_{n} FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
